jokes.text: A spite-store. Right.
jokes.setup: Larry explains his elaborate revenge plan against Mocha Joe
jokes.punchline: Chulu immediately recognizes and names this petty behavior with casual acceptance
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry David moment - his petty revenge scheme gets a clinical term. Shows how his neuroses are so extreme they're recognizable patterns.

jokes.text: Nasty motherfucker.
jokes.setup: Larry mentions Mocha Joe
jokes.punchline: Chulu's immediate, vehement reaction suggests Mocha Joe has wronged many people
jokes.explanation: Good character beat - suggests Mocha Joe's reputation precedes him and validates Larry's grievance

jokes.text: Pretty, pretty, pretty, pretty good.
jokes.setup: Larry tastes the scone
jokes.punchline: His signature catchphrase delivery
jokes.explanation: Classic Larry catchphrase - not original but perfectly integrated character moment

jokes.text: Side-sitting. Can't believe what it did to me.
jokes.setup: Serious legal discussion about sexual harassment lawsuit
jokes.punchline: Larry fixates on the trivial physical detail that started everything
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry neurosis - reducing a serious legal matter to his physical discomfort with an office chair

jokes.text: There's no other way to eat an apple but blithely.
jokes.setup: Lawyer criticizes Larry for eating an apple during serious discussion
jokes.punchline: Larry's confident assertion about apple-eating methodology
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Larry logic - taking a mundane criticism and turning it into an absolute philosophical statement about fruit consumption

jokes.text: My dad ate angry apples all the time.
jokes.setup: Larry insists apples can only be eaten blithely
jokes.punchline: Lawyer's personal anecdote about emotionally charged fruit consumption
jokes.explanation: Great escalation of the apple debate - the image of someone angrily eating fruit is inherently funny

jokes.text: I've never heard anybody using real fruit as for decoration purposes.
jokes.setup: Lawyer explains the apples are decorative
jokes.punchline: Larry's confusion about decorative vs. edible fruit
jokes.explanation: Good setup for the artificial fruit running gag - Larry's practical confusion about decorative items

jokes.text: Those aren't even apples for eating anyway. They're decorative.
jokes.setup: Entire argument about how to eat apples emotionally
jokes.punchline: Reveals the apples aren't meant to be eaten at all
jokes.explanation: Perfect misdirection that makes the entire previous argument even more absurd. Classic Curb escalation.

jokes.text: You have fruit that's not for eating. You have garbage not for garbage. And you have a bathroom that nobody can use.
jokes.setup: Larry's frustration with the lawyer's office rules
jokes.punchline: Building list of office absurdities culminating in unusable bathroom
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalating list structure - each item builds absurdity, ending with the most relatable frustration

jokes.text: It's artificial fruit.
jokes.setup: Larry admiring Jeff's fruit display
jokes.punchline: The reveal that the appealing fruit is fake
jokes.explanation: Sets up the artificial fruit running gag that will pay off throughout the episode

jokes.text: They didn't make them like that in the old days. This is a whole new technology.
jokes.setup: Examining the artificial fruit
jokes.punchline: Larry treating fake fruit as a technological marvel
jokes.explanation: Larry's tendency to get excited about mundane things presented as if they're revolutionary

jokes.text: You don't? Who cares what you like? You have such pedestrian taste anyway.
jokes.setup: Jeff doesn't like scones
jokes.punchline: Larry's dismissive insult about Jeff's taste
jokes.explanation: Classic Larry arrogance - insulting his friend's taste when they don't appreciate his project

jokes.text: It's like looking at confederate war monument. It's a history that's very hurtful for me.
jokes.setup: Larry wants Jeff to remove a photo with his ex-wife
jokes.punchline: Comparing a wedding photo to a confederate monument
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation - Larry comparing his personal discomfort to major historical trauma. Perfect absurdist logic.

jokes.text: It's like a buttermilk biscuit without the butter in it.
jokes.setup: Susie criticizing the dry scone
jokes.punchline: Her specific, devastating comparison
jokes.explanation: Good descriptive insult - captures exactly what's wrong with a bad scone in relatable terms

jokes.text: It's like a fireplace cardigan is what it is.
jokes.setup: Larry admiring Susie's sweater
jokes.punchline: His oddly specific description
jokes.explanation: Larry's tendency to create oddly specific categories for mundane things

jokes.text: We throw our trash in the pantry.
jokes.setup: Larry trying to throw something in the garbage
jokes.punchline: Revelation of the bizarre household garbage system
jokes.explanation: Great callback that escalates the garbage can confusion into even more absurd territory

jokes.text: Who needs all this shit when you're eating a snack?
jokes.setup: Discussion of scone messiness
jokes.punchline: Richard's practical complaint about inconvenient food
jokes.explanation: Relatable complaint about impractical foods, good character moment for Richard

jokes.text: Castilian, it's a dialect of Spanish. And they pronounce their z's as th's.
jokes.setup: Larry asking about Richard's pronunciation
jokes.punchline: Overly pedantic explanation of Spanish linguistics
jokes.explanation: Good character beat for Richard's pretentious tendencies

jokes.text: Fuck you, I'm paying and I'll see you tomorrow! You fucking idiot!
jokes.setup: Ongoing argument about who pays for lunch
jokes.punchline: Richard's aggressive insistence on paying combined with affectionate insult
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of their friendship dynamic - fighting over generosity with profanity

jokes.text: Concepción Zarzal
jokes.setup: Explaining Francisco's absence
jokes.punchline: The elaborate Spanish name that will become a running pronunciation gag
jokes.explanation: Sets up the pronunciation running gag that will pay off later

jokes.text: By the way, your friend Ted Danson came yesterday with a very attractive blonde. Cheryl!
jokes.setup: Casual mention of Ted Danson's dinner companion
jokes.punchline: The revelation that it was Larry's ex-wife
jokes.explanation: Perfect cringe moment - Larry learning about his ex-wife's date in the most awkward way possible

jokes.text: Can we talk about this another time, please?
jokes.setup: Larry asking about work logistics at a funeral
jokes.punchline: Francisco's reasonable but pointed request given the inappropriate setting
jokes.explanation: Great cringe moment - Larry's complete lack of social awareness at a funeral

jokes.text: Seriously?
jokes.setup: Larry asking Francisco to handle restaurant payment at funeral
jokes.punchline: Francisco's disbelief at Larry's inappropriate timing
jokes.explanation: Perfect reaction beat that captures how inappropriate Larry's request is in the moment.

jokes.text: Just give me that! Give it! Give it! Give it!
jokes.setup: Both trying to pay at the funeral
jokes.punchline: Physical fight over credit cards at a solemn occasion
jokes.explanation: Peak cringe - escalating their payment fight into physical comedy at a funeral

jokes.text: It's like you're saying roast beef is chicken. Roast beef is not chicken.
jokes.setup: Jeff calling scone a 'fancy muffin'
jokes.punchline: Larry's overly dramatic analogy about food categorization
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry escalation - turning pastry taxonomy into a philosophical crisis

jokes.text: That motherfucker!
jokes.setup: Seeing Ted Danson billboard while discussing him dating Cheryl
jokes.punchline: Larry's explosive reaction to the visual reminder
jokes.explanation: Good escalation - the billboard appearance perfectly timed with their conversation about Ted

jokes.text: Oh, my tongue! I can't believe you did that like that!
jokes.setup: Larry suddenly stopping the car
jokes.punchline: Jeff biting his tongue from the abrupt stop
jokes.explanation: Physical comedy consequence of Larry's impulsive behavior

jokes.text: You know how many times I put milk and Mountain Dew together? And I mean, I could have my own, my own fucking drink, Leon Black.
jokes.setup: Discussion of Arnold Palmer drink invention
jokes.punchline: Leon's claim about his disgusting drink combination deserving recognition
jokes.explanation: Great Leon character moment - his delusional confidence about a revolting drink combination

jokes.text: You motherfuckers will accept all kind of stupid shit in your mouth. Escargots and fucking wheatgrass.
jokes.setup: Leon complaining about white people's food choices
jokes.punchline: His specific examples of pretentious white foods
jokes.explanation: Classic Leon rant with great specific examples and his distinctive voice

jokes.text: Touché, motherfucker.
jokes.setup: Larry counters with examples of soul food
jokes.punchline: Leon's gracious concession while maintaining his profane style
jokes.explanation: Perfect Leon moment - intellectual acknowledgment delivered in his crude style

jokes.text: What the fuck? That's artificial fruit!
jokes.setup: Leon bites the artificial fruit
jokes.punchline: His shock at discovering it's fake after chipping his tooth
jokes.explanation: Great payoff of the artificial fruit running gag with physical consequences

jokes.text: Don't put the thing on the table in the fucking kitchen! What the fuck I'm supposed to do with it?
jokes.setup: Leon's tooth is chipped from artificial fruit
jokes.punchline: His reasonable complaint about fake food placement
jokes.explanation: Leon making a completely valid point about decorative fruit placement while profanely outraged

jokes.text: You are like a president in the 18th century on the back of a train, saying, 'And there will always be toast with eggs! And two turkeys in every garage!'
jokes.setup: Larry insisting eggs must come with toast
jokes.punchline: Richard's elaborate historical analogy mocking Larry's food absolutism
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation - turning Larry's food preferences into absurdist political campaign rhetoric. Creative and quotable.

jokes.text: Francisco's not here. He's mourning the death of his aunt, Concepción Zarzal.
jokes.setup: Larry expecting to pay with pre-placed credit card
jokes.punchline: The elaborate name pronunciation returning as Francisco's absence explanation
jokes.explanation: Good callback that maintains the running gag while advancing the plot

jokes.text: I think you can introduce me sort of as a renaissance man. You know, a guy who speaks six languages.
jokes.setup: Laverne asking how Larry wants to be introduced
jokes.punchline: Larry's grandiose self-aggrandizing suggestion
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry delusion - wanting to be introduced with completely false credentials

jokes.text: No, I only speak one language. Yeah. I know a little bit of Yiddish.
jokes.setup: Claims to speak six languages
jokes.punchline: Immediate admission he speaks only one (barely two)
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection - Larry immediately undermining his own grandiose request

jokes.text: Well, how else do you impress them?
jokes.setup: Laverne objecting to lying at charity event
jokes.punchline: Larry's matter-of-fact question about impression management
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry logic - genuinely puzzled by the concept of honest self-presentation

jokes.text: Can you donate a penis to a person who's transitioning?
jokes.setup: Larry asking about organ donation for transitioning people
jokes.punchline: His clinical but inappropriate question about penis donation
jokes.explanation: Classic Larry inappropriate question - genuinely curious but massively tone-deaf

jokes.text: Could a white transitioner get a black penis?
jokes.setup: Already inappropriate organ donation question
jokes.punchline: Larry escalating into racial territory
jokes.explanation: Larry doubling down on inappropriate territory - escalates the cringe effectively

jokes.text: It could be a rollercoaster. It could be a shoe. It could be a large intestine. You gotta think a little bit!
jokes.setup: Trying to salvage Larry's terrible doodle
jokes.punchline: Increasingly desperate interpretations ending with intestine
jokes.explanation: Great escalating list - each interpretation gets more ridiculous, good structure

jokes.text: It's what you find in a large intestine. It's a piece of shit.
jokes.setup: Discussion of what the doodle could represent
jokes.punchline: Larry's blunt assessment that it looks like feces
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry bluntness - cutting through the polite attempts to salvage his doodle

jokes.text: It smacks of kind of a white male privilege. You know, that you don't have to put any effort into anything.
jokes.setup: Larry's lazy doodle compared to others' artistic efforts
jokes.punchline: Christine's serious accusation of white male privilege over art quality
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment - turning a simple doodle into a social justice issue

jokes.text: No, she has a cold!
jokes.setup: Audience expecting Larry to hug/kiss Laverne Cox
jokes.punchline: Larry's shouted explanation while avoiding physical contact
jokes.explanation: Peak Larry moment - his neurosis about germs creating maximum cringe at worst possible moment

jokes.text: What the fuck? Oh, my god!
jokes.setup: Lawyer offering Larry an apple
jokes.punchline: Larry bites the artificial fruit and lawyer's shocked reaction
jokes.explanation: Great payoff - the lawyer who introduced artificial fruit becomes victim of his own prop

jokes.text: Francisco Zarzal!
jokes.setup: Discovering fraudulent credit card charges
jokes.punchline: Larry's pronunciation of the name with his chipped tooth
jokes.explanation: Good callback with the added element of Larry's chipped tooth affecting pronunciation

jokes.text: It's not Tharthal, it's Zarzal.
jokes.setup: Larry mispronouncing the name due to chipped tooth
jokes.punchline: Francisco's correction highlighting the pronunciation difference
jokes.explanation: Nice convergence of running gags - Spanish pronunciation meets chipped tooth consequences

jokes.text: Don't throw me in the garbage can!
jokes.setup: Being thrown out of the funeral
jokes.punchline: Larry's plea referencing his ongoing garbage can obsession
jokes.explanation: Excellent callback - Larry's garbage can neurosis surfaces even while being physically ejected

jokes.text: She was really attractive.
jokes.setup: Larry mentioning Gloria Steinem poster from his youth
jokes.punchline: Reducing the feminist icon to her physical appearance
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry tone-deafness - completely missing the point about feminist activism

jokes.text: So dry. I can't breathe.
jokes.setup: Alice eating Larry's scone as peace offering
jokes.punchline: Her choking on the notoriously dry scone
jokes.explanation: Perfect finale payoff - the scone that was supposed to be Larry's triumph becomes final disaster

jokes.text: What? Oh, my god. You want the Heimlich?
jokes.setup: Alice choking on dry scone
jokes.punchline: Larry's offer to help after causing the problem
jokes.explanation: Great escalation where Larry's attempt to make peace literally endangers his accuser. Perfect ending irony.
